title: Machine Learning for Early Detection of Diabetes Using Patient Health Records
abstract: This study investigates the application of machine learning algorithms including Random Forest and XGBoost for early detection of Type 2 diabetes using electronic health records. The model achieved 94.2% accuracy on a dataset of 10000 patients.
keywords: machine learning; diabetes; health informatics; classification; EHR

title: Natural Language Processing for Sentiment Analysis of Social Media Posts During COVID-19
abstract: An analysis of public sentiment on Twitter and Facebook during the COVID-19 pandemic using BERT-based models. Results reveal significant shifts in public trust and mental health indicators.
keywords: NLP; sentiment analysis; COVID-19; social media; BERT; public health

title: Blockchain-Based Land Registry System for the Philippines
abstract: Proposes a decentralized land registry using Ethereum smart contracts to reduce fraud and streamline property transfer. Piloted in three municipalities.
keywords: blockchain; land registry; smart contracts; Ethereum; e-governance

title: Deep Learning for Automated Rice Disease Detection Using Drone Imagery
abstract: Convolutional neural networks applied to aerial imagery for real-time detection of rice blast and brown spot diseases. Achieved 91% accuracy with a lightweight MobileNetV3 model.
keywords: deep learning; CNN; rice disease; drone; agriculture; computer vision

title: A Comparative Study of Renewable Energy Adoption Barriers in Rural Philippine Communities
abstract: Surveys and interviews with 320 rural households identify financial constraints regulatory gaps and technical knowledge as the primary barriers to solar energy adoption.
keywords: renewable energy; solar; rural electrification; energy policy; Philippines

title: Gamification in Higher Education: Effects on Student Engagement and Academic Performance
abstract: A quasi-experimental study across four universities measuring the impact of gamified learning modules on student motivation GPA and retention rates in STEM subjects.
keywords: gamification; education technology; student engagement; STEM; higher education

title: Federated Learning for Privacy-Preserving Medical Image Analysis
abstract: Proposes a federated learning framework enabling hospitals to collaboratively train diagnostic models without sharing raw patient data. Evaluated on chest X-ray datasets.
keywords: federated learning; privacy; medical imaging; X-ray; distributed AI

title: Urban Heat Island Mitigation Through Green Roof Implementation in Metro Manila
abstract: Models temperature reduction and energy savings from large-scale green roof adoption in three Metro Manila cities using GIS and CFD simulations.
keywords: urban heat island; green roof; Metro Manila; climate adaptation; GIS

title: Cybersecurity Risk Assessment Framework for Philippine Small and Medium Enterprises
abstract: Develops and validates a lightweight cybersecurity risk assessment framework tailored to the resource constraints of SMEs. Tested across 50 businesses in NCR.
keywords: cybersecurity; risk assessment; SME; information security; Philippines

title: Predicting Student Dropout in Online Learning Environments Using Clickstream Data
abstract: Logistic regression and neural network models trained on LMS clickstream data to predict at-risk students 4 weeks before dropout. Achieves 87% precision.
keywords: student dropout; e-learning; learning analytics; clickstream; prediction

title: IoT-Based Smart Water Quality Monitoring System for Aquaculture Farms
abstract: Deploys a low-cost IoT sensor network for real-time monitoring of pH temperature dissolved oxygen and ammonia in tilapia fish farms.
keywords: IoT; water quality; aquaculture; sensors; smart farming

title: The Impact of Microfinance on Women Empowerment in Rural Mindanao
abstract: Quantitative study measuring income autonomy financial literacy and decision-making authority among 400 female microfinance beneficiaries in five Mindanao provinces.
keywords: microfinance; women empowerment; rural development; Mindanao; gender

title: Autonomous Vehicle Navigation in Unstructured Environments Using LiDAR and Camera Fusion
abstract: Develops a multi-modal perception system combining LiDAR point clouds and camera feeds for navigation in construction zones and informal roads.
keywords: autonomous vehicles; LiDAR; sensor fusion; computer vision; robotics

title: Mental Health Prediction Using Social Media Behavioral Patterns
abstract: Analyzes posting frequency timing content themes and engagement patterns on Facebook to build a depression risk prediction model with 83% AUC.
keywords: mental health; social media; depression; behavioral analysis; machine learning

title: Supply Chain Disruption Analysis During COVID-19 and Recovery Strategies for Philippine Manufacturing
abstract: Case studies of 15 Philippine manufacturers document supply chain failures and evaluates recovery strategies including reshoring and supplier diversification.
keywords: supply chain; COVID-19; manufacturing; resilience; Philippines

title: Quantum Computing Applications in Cryptography: Current State and Future Implications
abstract: A systematic review of quantum algorithms that threaten current encryption standards and evaluates post-quantum cryptographic alternatives.
keywords: quantum computing; cryptography; post-quantum; security; systematic review

title: Automated Filipino Sign Language Recognition Using MediaPipe and LSTM Networks
abstract: A real-time recognition system for 100 Filipino Sign Language gestures using hand landmark detection and sequence modeling achieving 96% accuracy.
keywords: sign language; LSTM; MediaPipe; accessibility; Filipino; computer vision

title: Carbon Footprint Assessment of Construction Materials in Philippine Green Buildings
abstract: Life cycle analysis comparing the embodied carbon of conventional and sustainable construction materials used in LEED-certified buildings in the Philippines.
keywords: carbon footprint; life cycle assessment; green building; construction; sustainability
